fact: JMI product engineering team delivered Network Analysis and Operations, Energy Management & Lighting Control systems as a turn-key solution from their development centres in USA and India. These are hosted by JMI and offered as a SaaS solution to over twenty five active utility customers around the World. (Source: https://www.jeanmartin.com/, live as of July 2026)

JMI Property Smart Grid™ solution provides a modular energy management system complete with smart devices and web-based software to monitor property and portfolio electricity, gas & oil, water, and HVAC systems. (Source: https://www.jeanmartin.com/travel-hospitality and https://www.jeanmartin.com/hospitality — both live pages confirmed as of July 2026 crawl; also corroborated on https://www.jeanmartin.com/products)
Prior to starting JMI, Shawn was instrumental in implementing various Banking and Investment Banking products and solutions for organizations like Citigroup and Goldman Sachs.
